description: You are a Data Analyst at a global media company. The VP of Sales needs a high-level regional performance report. Implement a regional mapping in the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) by creating a 'region_mapping' table with columns 'Country' (Primary Key), 'RegionCode', and 'RegionName'. Populate this table by mapping every distinct BillingCountry in the 'invoices' table to a region: North America (NA) for USA and Canada; Latin America (LATAM) for Brazil, Chile, and Argentina; Asia Pacific (APAC) for Australia and India; Europe/Middle East/Africa (EMEA) for United Kingdom, Germany, France, Czech Republic, Austria, Belgium, Denmark, Finland, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Spain, and Sweden; and 'OTH'/'Other' for any other country. Create a view named 'v_regional_sales' that joins 'invoices' and 'region_mapping' to calculate RegionName, InvoiceCount, TotalRevenue, and AvgOrderValue. Export the view results ordered by TotalRevenue descending to /home/ga/Documents/exports/regional_sales_summary.csv and save the SQL DDL/DML script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/create_regions.sql.
